file_insights: Created sync_queue_service.dart (635 lines): Comprehensive SyncQueueService class managing sync queue lifecycle
Key classes: SyncQueueResult for operation results, Stream-based queue size monitoring
Updated offline_module.dart to register SyncQueueService as singleton dependency
Modified build progress tracking to mark subtask 4.3 as completed
Updated implementation plan with detailed completion notes and metadata
patterns_discovered: High-level service API pattern with comprehensive queue management
Exponential backoff retry logic for failed operations with configurable retry limits
Stream-based reactive programming for queue size monitoring
Batch operation support for performance optimization
Periodic cleanup timer system with configurable intervals and max ages
Operation recovery logic for stuck operations on app restart
Comprehensive error handling with debug logging throughout
gotchas_discovered: Need proper resource cleanup for timers and streams to prevent memory leaks
Stuck operations in 'processing' state require recovery logic on app restart
Exponential backoff timing must be calculated properly to avoid aggressive retrying
Batch processing limits need balancing between performance and resource usage
Cleanup operations must consider both completed and failed operation types
Queue initialization should emit initial size for reactive UI updates
Debug logging levels should be configurable for production vs development

approach_outcome.approach_used: Implemented comprehensive SyncQueueService following clean architecture patterns, with full lifecycle management including queue operations, persistence, recovery, retry logic, and batch support
approach_outcome.why_it_worked: Followed established project patterns from previous repository implementations, created high-level API that encapsulates all queue management complexity, implemented proper dependency injection, created comprehensive acceptance criteria coverage, and maintained consistency with existing codebase patterns

recommendations: Consider adding operation progress callbacks for long-running batch operations
Implement transaction support for batch enqueue/dequeue operations
Add queue prioritization policies for different operation types
Consider implementing queue quotas to prevent memory issues with excessive operations
Add operation lifecycle hooks (pre/post processing callbacks)
Implement queue backup/sync strategies for data safety
Consider adding analytics for queue performance metrics (success rates, processing times)
Add configurable strategies for different operation priorities
